raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> From XXXX XXXX CASE : XXXX Transaction Amount {$58000.00} To American Express Subject : Disputing unauthorized charge for merchandise lost due to negligence in delivery. 
I am writing to urgently dispute the unauthorized charge on my account for merchandise that was lost due to negligence during the delivery process. I kindly request that you refrain from refilling the charge and take immediate action to rectify this matter. 
Despite my repeated attempts to resolve this issue with the merchant, they have consistently provided the same response that they are entitled no responsibility for the lost merchandise in accordance with their policy .However the delivery itself was clearly unsecured as the merchandise was left outside the property garage gate where it was visible to the pedestrians and the drivers on the street. 
It is important to note that the merchant has shown no willingness to collaborate with the carrier to address this situation. Instead they insist on holing me, the consumer, solely responsible for the lost .I am unable to make payment for the unauthorized charge unless the merchant prices the merchandise correctly. 
I strongly urge you to intervene in this matter and prevent this procedure from continuing .The financial burden and the stress caused by this situation are greatly affecting me and I simply do not have the time or resources to deal with it further. 
I sincerely hope that American Express will address this matter promptly and help resolve this dispute in a fair and satisfactory manner. I do not want the irresponsibility of the merchant to tarnish my credit ability which I have worked diligently to maintain. 
Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter. I look forward to a swift resolution Sincerely
